title: Rites Of Intensification
content:
Did time on the Hegelian
        spirit, Freudian id,
        the totemic response to
        the unknowable
        where each phenomenon of nature
        became dream time itself,
        the electric crackle
        of God's Voice-
        movement from shadowy spectre to
        tight-lipped showmanship
        the learned empathy
        of tires careening around
        their throttled load.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Rites Of Intensification", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
